title: lycium barbarum var. chinense
intro: Lycium barbarum var. chinense, also known as Chinese wolfberry or Gou Qi Zi, is a plant species belonging to the nightshade family, characterized by its small, red, and edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Lycium barbarum var. chinense include reducing oxidative stress, improving visual acuity, and supporting immune function, as well as potentially helping to manage conditions such as diabetes, cardiovascular disease, and cancer. Herbal preparations of Lycium barbarum var. chinense include dried fruits, extracts, and capsules, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement to support overall health and well-being.
